features.name: generate loop driving unpacked array element with always_ff
features.description: Code should include a generate loop with genvar iterating over an unpacked array, where each generated always_ff block drives a different element of the array using the genvar as index

features.name: output unpacked array port with generate loop driving
features.description: Code should include an output unpacked array port where array elements are driven by separate generated always_ff processes within a generate loop using genvar indexing

features.name: two unpacked arrays driven by generate loop with cmd_latch logic
features.description: Code should include two unpacked arrays where one is driven by a generate loop with always_ff and the other is driven by a separate always_ff process that latches values from the first array on a cmd_latch signal
